# terrible_community_general_keycloak_clientscope (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `attributes` (String) A dict of key/value pairs to set as custom attributes for the client_scope. Values may be single values (for example a string) or a list of strings.
- `description` (String) Description for this client_scope. This parameter is not required for updating or deleting a client_scope.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this client_scope. This parameter is not required for updating or deleting a client_scope but providing it reduces the number of API calls required.
- `name` (String) Name of the client_scope. This parameter is required only when creating or updating the client_scope.
- `protocol` (String) Type of client. The `docker-v2` value was added in community.general 8.6.0.
- `protocol_mappers` (String) A list of dicts defining protocol mappers for this client. This is `protocolMappers` in the Keycloak REST API.
- `realm` (String) They Keycloak realm under which this client_scope resides.
- `state` (String) State of the client_scope. On `present`, the client_scope is created if it does not yet exist, or updated with the parameters you provide. On `absent`, the client_scope is removed if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of client scope after module execution (sample is truncated).
- `existing` (String) Representation of existing client scope (sample is truncated).
- `msg` (String) Message as to what action was taken.
- `proposed` (String) Representation of proposed client scope.
